item.title: Random set of the day: Amazon Ancient Ruins
item.author: Huwbot
item.description:
Today's random set is 5986 Amazon Ancient Ruins, released during 1999. It's one of 14 Adventurers sets produced that year. It contains 458 pieces and 8 minifigs, and its retail price was US$80, which equates to about US$152 in today's money.

It's owned by 1,250 Brickset members. If you want to add it to your collection you should find it for sale at Brick Owl, BrickLink, where new ones sell for around $1,200.00, or eBay.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Random figure of the day: pi174
item.author: Huwbot
item.description:
Today's random figure is pi174 Bluecoat Soldier 6 - Cheek Lines, Black Hair, a Pirates figure that came in one set, 40158 Pirates Chess Set, released during 2015.

Our members collectively own a total of 18,465 of them. If you'd like to buy one you should find it for sale at Brick Owl or BrickLink, where new ones sell for around $5.00.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Up-Scaled Darth Vader and AT-RT Driver Helmet revealed!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
A new up-scaled LEGO minifigure format debuted in 2021 and has since been applied to various characters, now including Darth Vader! 75461 Up-Scaled Darth Vader Minifigure feels overdue, but its execution looks excellent on the whole.

In addition, the Helmet Collection endures with 75458 Imperial Remnant AT-RT Driver Helmet. I am surprised to see the series continue following the introduction of Star Wars busts, though this model looks impressive, so perhaps there is value in having both collections ongoing.

These sets will be available from June 1st and more images are available after the break...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: What's hot this week
item.author: Huwbot
item.description:
These are the sets that have been viewed the most this week:

TWLWSetViews
111506 Rocking Plants2605
280121 Ancient Moon-Gazing Inn2230
39605 4.5V Technic Resource Set2048
42187 Freestyle Set2016
57825 Creator Bucket2011
62↓75192 Millennium Falcon1910
715↑40917 The Darksaber1893
860509 Harbour Freight Train1847
97↓75442 The Mandalorian's N-1 Starfighter1600
103↓75978 Diagon Alley1538

The total number of set detail pages viewed this week is 1,547,571, which is 108,432 more than last week.

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: New decorative LEGO Creator sets unveiled!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
I think the initial selection of Creator sets announced earlier today looks brilliant and a few more sets have been added to LEGO.com since.

Creator has included an increasing number of decorative models in the last couple of years and the series continues here, with the likes of 31390 Floral Art Painting and 31392 Music Décor Piano.

View these sets after the break...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Even more summer LEGO Friends official images!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
Several more LEGO Friends sets have appeared on LEGO.com today, in addition to those already revealed.

These are mostly smaller sets, but there are still some delightful designs, such as 42682 Nature Glamping Cabin and 42701 Koala Habitat & Care Centre!

Take a look at the new sets below...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Summer LEGO NINJAGO Dragons Rising sets announced!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
Three excellent NINJAGO Legends sets were unveiled earlier today and now the Dragons Rising season four sets have been announced as well.

These sets will be released on June 1st in Europe and Australasia, but not until August 1st in North America.

There are definitely some interesting sets, notably including 71868 Wyldyre's Transforming Dragon Mech, which looks like a fairly ordinary dragon at first glance, but features a dramatic transformation function!

View the transformation and the other new Dragons Rising sets below...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: More summer LEGO City sets revealed!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
An initial batch of upcoming LEGO City sets was revealed a few hours ago and several more have now been added to LEGO.com.

Highlights include 60480 Backhoe Loader and 60497 Drive-Through Car Wash and you can view the newly-revealed sets below...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: LEGO Speed Champions Fast & Furious Toyota Supra and Ferrari LMP Car revealed!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
A couple of new Speed Champions sets have been announced today, joining 77262 Ken Block's 1965 Ford Mustang Hoonicorn RTR V1 and 77264 Jaguar F-TYPE Project 7 & Land Rover Defender Classic.

Brian's orange Toyota Supra from Fast & Furious and the Ferrari 499P will be available from June 1st, costing £22.99, $29.99, €27.99 each. Both look superb to me and I am glad to see the trend of Speed Champions cars appearing as microscale and minifigure-scale models continues, after the 30709 Ferrari 499P - Hypercar recruitment bag was released last year.

More images are available below...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: LEGO SEGA Genesis Console revealed!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
It has been an extremely busy few hours and we are not done yet! 40926 SEGA Genesis Console will be available from June 1st and follows last year's 40769 SEGA Genesis Controller.

The set includes 479 pieces and will cost £34.99, $39.99 or €39.99, which seems very reasonable.

View a couple more images after the break...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: New LEGO Bluey sets announced!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
Three new LEGO Bluey sets have been revealed, notably including the first non-4+ set from this theme, 11217 Brick-Built Bluey Family.

As the name suggests, this set includes large-scale renditions of the family members, with various accessories and parts to change their expressions. The other two sets, meanwhile, introduce a few new minifigures.

Find all the images below...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Summer LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog sets revealed!
item.author: TheBrickPal
item.description:
Following the Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds sets in January, the LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog theme is back with another wave, as two new sets will be released on the 1st of August.

77119 Tails' Tornado-1 takes inspiration from Sonic Unleashed, which is one of my favorite Sonic games. Unfortunately, however, there's no Werehog minifigure to be found. 77120 Shadow's Mech vs. G.U.N. Trooper isn't based on any official material, although it does incorporate several traits from the character, such as the usage of a motorcycle and the Doom Wing!

View images and details after the break...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Summer LEGO BrickHeadz Disney sets revealed!
item.author: TheBrickPal
item.description:
Following the unveiling of 40924 Megatron Robot & Vehicle earlier, more new BrickHeadz sets have been revealed, both based on classic Disney movies.

40925 Alice in Wonderland and 40860 Toy Story will be released on June 1st, retailing for £34.99, $39.99, or €39.99 each. Both packs include some interesting figures, which you can view after the break...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Six magical LEGO Disney sets revealed!
item.author: SetToBuild
item.description:
The LEGO Disney summer sets star adorable buildable characters from Moana, and Lilo and Stitch, as well as a Little Mermaid playset containing the first ever minidoll for Ursula's alter ego, Vanessa.

A uniquely Aladdin-based set hasn't been seen since 2023, but the subtheme returns here as a jewellery box depicting a scene of Aladdin showing a whole new world to Jasmine above the Palace of Agrabah.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Summer LEGO Minecraft sets revealed!
item.author: TheBrickPal
item.description:
LEGO Minecraft released an impressive wave in January, and that level of quality looks to continue with the sets releasing on June 1st.

Among some minifigure-scale sets, we also get some more buildable characters with 21592 Chicken Jockey Desert Attack and 21594 The Skeleton. However, the highlight for me is the display-focused 21595 The Ender Dragon!

View those sets and more after the break, then let us know what you think in the comments.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Plunge into action with four new sets from LEGO Fortnite!
item.author: SetToBuild
item.description:
After a brief drought, LEGO Fortnite has several sets dropping in to level up your gaming space this summer.

Every entry in this wave is brilliantly vibrant and ready for the season, but 77082 Rave Cave in particular is perfectly suited—it invokes thrilling memories of a sunny day at an amusement park.

View all four new sets below...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Summer LEGO NINJAGO Legends sets unveiled!
item.author: TheBrickPal
item.description:
NINJAGO's fifteenth anniversary year continues with a few spectacular summer sets unveiled today! These are based on the NINJAGO Legends miniseries, following the two sets released last year.

All three models are incredible, but my absolute favorite has to be 71871 Battle at the Dragon's Blade, which is brilliant in both concept and execution!

The wave will be released on the 1st of June, and you can find images and details after the break...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Summer LEGO Friends sets revealed!
item.author: MeganL
item.description:
Among the multitude of sets being revealed today is the summer wave of Friends. It looks like there are some familiar scenes (hotels and amusement parks, anyone?).

I'm particularly interested in 42703 Mermaid Roller Coaster, which looks like the best Friends roller coaster ever, and 42704 Heartlake City Grand Hotel. While there have been three Grand Hotels, this one looks like it may have more similarities to the original 41101 Heartlake Grand Hotel, which also had an elevator.

Check out the images after the break...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Vintage set of the week: Jeep with Steering
item.author: Huwbot
item.description:
This week's vintage set is 385 Jeep with Steering, released during 1976. It's one of 28 LEGOLAND sets produced that year. It contains 57 pieces.

It's owned by 359 Brickset members. If you want to add it to your collection you might find it for sale at Brick Owl, BrickLink or eBay.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Four more LEGO Technic sets revealed, one of which isn't a car!
item.author: Huw
item.description:
Fans of 'proper' Technic finally have something to look forward to, among the plethora of cars.

Although it's a four-wheeled vehicle, at least 42242 Mercedes-Benz Unimog U 5023 with Crane features pneumatics, the first set to do so since 2024.

Three 'more of the same' cars have also been revealed, including two from the Fast and Furious franchise, one of which is another version of Dom's Dodge.

View pictures of all four after the break.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Megatron debuts in LEGO BrickHeadz form!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
Megatron has been conspicuous by his absence from the LEGO Transformers range to date, but he is finally arriving on June 1st, as a BrickHeadz figure!

The carefully-named 40924 Megatron Robot & Vehicle contains 224 pieces and will cost £19.99, $24.99 or €24.99.

Fans have discussed whether Megatron's alternate tank mode would prove problematic for a LEGO model and I think use of the term 'Megatron Vehicle' on the box suggests that it is an issue, although if a BrickHeadz set is possible, perhaps a large-scale transforming model is too! I certainly hope so.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Summer LEGO City sets unveiled!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
LEGO City has been among my favourite themes for the past couple of years and this summer's range is one of the best yet!

Trains are a particular focus this summer, between 60509 Harbour Freight Train, 60511 Vintage Steam Train and 60506 Classic Beach Tram, all of which look excellent to me, while the construction site continues to expand with 60494 Dump Truck & Front End Loader.

However, as someone who grew up in the 2000s, the Power Miners-inspired 60501 Lava Land Roller Coaster Park is perhaps the standout set for me, even if it is a recolour of a past roller coaster.

These sets will be released on June 1st and you can view all the images after the break...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Random figure of the day: coltlnm17
item.author: Huwbot
item.description:
Today's random figure is coltlnm17 Gong & Guitar Rocker, The LEGO Ninjago Movie, a Collectible Minifigures figure that came in one set, 710197 Gong & Guitar Rocker, released during 2017.

Our members collectively own a total of 18,596 of them. If you'd like to buy one you should find it for sale at Brick Owl or BrickLink, where new ones sell for around $4.80.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Three beautiful botanical sets revealed!
item.author: Huw
item.description:
The botanicals theme looks set to continue to flourish with the introduction of three new sets during the summer.

11505 Woodland Mushrooms takes the theme into the realm of fungi and looks spectacular, successfully capturing the weird and wonderful shapes and colours of wild mushrooms.

11511 Water Lilies also introduces a new concept to the range: aquatic plants, which come with bowls of 'water' to display them in, while 11514 Cosmos flowers is another small bouquet.

View pictures of all three after the break.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Embark on new adventures with six LEGO Creator sets!
item.author: SetToBuild
item.description:
The LEGO Creator zoo expands this summer with three more striking animals and their respective biomes.

However, if the smell of wildlife is a bit too overpowering, you can mask it with a beautiful bottle of perfume! Build-and-sniff technology not included.

In addition, minifigures return to LEGO Creator in this wave, adding more excitement to your stories and play with two "iconic" sets: a pirate ship and a ferris wheel.

Check out all the images below...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Summer LEGO Harry Potter sets revealed!
item.author: TheBrickPal
item.description:
LEGO Harry Potter is celebrating its twenty-fifth anniversary this year, so as you can imagine, plenty more sets are on the way this summer! Eight have been revealed, releasing on June 1st.

The clear standout here is 76473 Hogwarts Castle: East Wing, but there are some other nice options, as well. You can view them all after the break, then let us know your thoughts in the comments.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Quick Look: 43022 Lewis Hamilton Helmet
item.author: Huw
item.description:
43022 Lewis Hamilton Helmet is one of two Formula 1 drivers' helmets that are released today.

It's essentially a recoloured version of 43014 Charles Leclerc's, so, having examined the parts, internal structure, and intricate building techniques in our review of the Monegasque driver’s protective headgear, this article provides a brief look at the seven-time world champion’s helmet and his minifigure, along with a view of the two side by side.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: LEGO Animal Crossing returns!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
LEGO Animal Crossing was conspicuously absent from the January range, other than a polybag, but a new set has been unveiled today.

77059 Timmy & Tommy's Fun Day Out moves away from the theme's normal format, instead featuring two brick-built figures in an attractive nature scene. We do not know the price at the moment, but the set contains 513 pieces and will be released on August 1st.

More images are available below...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: LEGO Speed Champions Jaguar F-TYPE Project 7 & Land Rover Defender Classic official images!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
Another upcoming Speed Champions set, 77264 Jaguar F-TYPE Project 7 & Land Rover Defender Classic, has been announced, comprising 740 pieces between the two cars.

These vehicles look great to me, but we do not have confirmed prices yet. Hopefully they will be added to LEGO.com later today and this article will be updated with additional images and information then.

View the box after the break...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: 2026 LEGO Advent Calendars announced!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
Nothing says Christmas like the start of May, so this year's Advent Calendars have been unveiled!

It seems there are only four this year, from City, Star Wars, Marvel and Disney, so Friends and Harry Potter are conspicuously absent and Minecraft was presumably just for one year. However, the four we do have look excellent, including plenty of new figures and some fun models.

I will show box images immediately after the break and then you can view the contents further down the page...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: LEGO Star Wars 75451 Hutt Palace Sentry Droid Showdown revealed!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
The first wave of The Mandalorian and Grogu sets has only just been launched and perhaps the most interesting set from the movie so far has already been revealed, ahead of its release in August.

75451 Hutt Palace Sentry Droid Showdown is a 415-piece set, most notable for reintroducing the Kyuzo bounty hunter Embo in minifigure form, fifteen years after his appearance in 7930 Bounty Hunter Assault Gunship! However, he is not alone this time, joined by his pet Anooba, Keibu, as well as The Mandalorian and Grogu.

Embo was also accompanied by an Anooba in the Clone Wars, named Marrok. I would never have expected to see them as LEGO figures, but Keibu looks fantastic to me. The sentry droid looks good too, with lots of mechanical detail.

More images are available after the break...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Summer LEGO Technic sets revealed!
item.author: Huw
item.description:
Four of the summer wave of Technic sets were revealed overnight, and among them is one that's genuinely interesting, bringing the random box concept to the theme: 42233 Mighty Machines - Series 1.

The box contains around 40 parts, some of which are new, that build one of eight mini models.

The other three models are boring cars of which you can view pictures after the break.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: New sets available now and MtF promotions begin today!
item.author: Huw
item.description:
Today sees the release of many highly-anticipated sets and also the start of the annual Star Wars May the Fourth promotions.

Offers

From now until May 6th, while stocks last:

  • 40917 The Darksaber is free when you spend over $160/€160/£145 on Star Wars sets
  • 30728 The Razor Crest is free with orders of Star Wars sets exceeding $40/€40/£35
  • 5010320 The Mandalorian and Grogu Display is free when you buy 75442 The Mandalorian's N-1 Starfighter which is launched today

View details of all current offers at LEGO.com »

New Insiders rewards

  • 5010325 The Mandalorian and Grogu Metal Card

Visit the Insiders centre »

New releases

  • 75442 The Mandalorian's N-1 Starfighter ($249.99 / £229.99 / €249.99)
  • 71052 LEGO Minifigures - Series 29
  • F1 helmets 43014 Charles Leclerc and 43022 Lewis Hamilton ($89.99 / £79.99 / €89.99)
  • 11506 Rocking Plants ($22.99 / £17.99 / €19.99)
  • Eight football-related Editions sets
  • Four Toy Story sets, including the adorable 43306 Lotso

View all new sets at LEGO.com or on our shopping pages, where it's easier to see what's just been added.

What do you plan to buy today?

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Random set of the day: Helicopter Transport
item.author: Huwbot
item.description:
Today's random set is 1276 Helicopter Transport, released during 1999. It's one of 12 Rock Raiders sets produced that year. It contains 22 pieces and 1 minifig.

It's owned by 219 Brickset members. If you want to add it to your collection you should find it for sale at Brick Owl, BrickLink, where new ones sell for around $161.50, or eBay.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Random figure of the day: sh0967
item.author: Huwbot
item.description:
Today's random figure is sh0967 Hulk - Giant, Dark Bluish Gray Pants, Raging, a Super Heroes figure that came in one set, 76290 The Avengers vs. The Leviathan, released during 2024.

Our members collectively own a total of 2,829 of them. If you'd like to buy one you should find it for sale at Brick Owl or BrickLink, where new ones sell for around $16.70.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Stunning new LEGO Chinese Traditional Festival sets revealed!
item.author: CapnRex101
item.description:
A huge number of new sets will be revealed over the next couple of days and we are starting with some great additions to the Chinese Traditional Festival range!

80121 Ancient Moon-Gazing Inn, shown to the right, looks lovely to me and offers exceptional value, with 1530 pieces and nine minifigures for £99.99, $129.99, €109.99. 80120 Prosperity Carp Leaping is interesting as well, based on a Chinese idiom.

Both sets will be available from June 1st and you can view more images below...

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Review: 42685 Heartlake City Fashion Show
item.author: MeganL
item.description:
One of the things I really enjoy about the Friends universe is how it represents so much of ordinary life that we don't see in the other themes. We also get to see some other, somewhat more unconventional, sets that we also wouldn't see in other themes. 42685 Heartlake City Fashion Show definitely fits in that latter category.

While there have been several fashion-themed sets before, this is the first set in the Friends world that lets the minidolls do their own rendition of Vogue. So we won't just stand here, let's get to it, they'll strike a pose, there's nothing to it.....

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Throwback Thursday - Vintage shop display models
item.author: FlagsNZ
item.description:
It has been a while since my last showcase of models from The BLOCKS Collection.

One of the themes that I have been wanting to showcase is The BLOCKS Collection's impressive range of vintage shop models.

All of these models have been glued together as part of their original construction.

They have all been used as part of a permanent shop display. Some of the larger models have been assembled with a mixture of System and DUPLO bricks.

Read on as I showcase this extensive range of vintage shop display models.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Random set of the day: Screaming Patriot
item.author: Huwbot
item.description:
Today's random set is 6646 Screaming Patriot, released during 1991. It's one of 23 Town sets produced that year. It contains 65 pieces and 1 minifig, and its retail price was US$6.75, which equates to about US$16 in today's money.

It's owned by 4,420 Brickset members. If you want to add it to your collection you should find it for sale at Brick Owl, BrickLink, where new ones sell for around $60.00, or eBay.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.

item.title: Random figure of the day: hky010
item.author: Huwbot
item.description:
Today's random figure is hky010 Street Hockey Player, Red Torso, Tan Legs, a Sports figure that came in one set, 3579 NHL Street Hockey, released during 2004.

Our members collectively own a total of 505 of them. If you'd like to buy one you should find it for sale at Brick Owl or BrickLink, where new ones sell for around $7.20.

Continue reading »

© 2026 Brickset.com. Republication prohibited without prior permission.
